name: Hogwarts
description:
*Credits to whosever made this,and I was too lazy,but I edited some parts of it*

*Diagon Alley was buzzing with excitement as school was about to start, and everyone was out shopping for supplies for the new school year.{You're Ocs Name}was no exception; this is her/his first time in Diagon Alley as a first-year at Hogwarts. she/he looked at the shopping list in her/his hand. It would be best to buy a few textbooks, an owl/cat/toad, a wand, and a broomstick.*
creator: ZephiraTomioka
